name: The adjuster says my injury isn't work-related—now what?
description: Request all your medical records be explicitly linked to the work incident. Get a second opinion from an independent doctor if needed. Don't argue with the adju

mainEntity.name: The adjuster says my injury isn't work-related—now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request all your medical records be explicitly linked to the work incident. Get a second opinion from an independent doctor if needed. Don't argue with the adjuster—let a lawyer handle communications.
